name: GOLFTEC Lehi
about: GOLFTEC Lehi is a golf training studio specializing in data-driven instruction and club fitting. Utilizing advanced technology like OPTIMOTION motion tracking, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors, the studio provides personalized coaching to help golfers improve their swing. Services include private lessons, on-course playing lessons, and custom club fittings with certified fitters. The facility features training bays equipped with simulator technology for practice and analysis sessions. GOLFTEC offers various lesson packages, memberships for practice access, and a pro shop with equipment available at a 10% discount to retail prices. Their approach combines professional coaching with objective measurement to track student progress and provide clear improvement strategies.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven instruction using advanced technology like OPTIMOTION and launch monitors
Certified professional coaches who create personalized improvement plans
Club fitting services that add an average of 21 more yards off the tee
Practice memberships offering access to bays with video feedback and launch monitors
Indoor training environment that provides detailed swing analysis not available on the range

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food service on-site. BYOB policy not specified.
No mention of alcohol service on-site. BYOB policy not specified.

simulator_hardware.notes: Launch monitor mentioned as part of their technology suite

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While you can bring your own clubs, GOLFTEC provides clubs for use during lessons and fittings. They also offer a pro shop where you can purchase equipment, typically with a 10% discount to retail prices.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food or drink service at GOLFTEC Lehi. BYOB policies are not specified on their website.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC focuses on instruction and practice rather than full simulator play. Their typical services include 30-60 minute lessons and practice sessions. On-course playing lessons are also available as part of their improvement programs.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers programs for juniors and youth. They provide personalized coaching and technology-based training suitable for junior golfers looking to improve their skills.
